plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-225 RP06.P07.M04.S06-RP06.P07.M05.S20 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-225 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP06.P07.M04 secondary workflow tail and the M05 permission/audit binding head (40 failure-taxonomy rows across two sections) with Hermes evidence, Claude review packet, and CP00-226 handoff, without opening rollback/retry runtime, lock acquisition, permission runtime evaluation, AI runtime dispatch, DMS runtime dispatch, Hermes runtime receipts, review/approval route runtime, state writes, idempotency persistence, workflow persistence, object storage, OCR, search, email, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-225 is a descriptor-only DMS-core "failure binding slice" pack covering exactly 40 RP06 units (RP06.P07.M04.S06-RP06.P07.M05.S20): the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice tail (20 rows) plus the M05 Permission And Audit Binding head (20 rows). Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level descriptor-verification claim is supported and the no-write/no-real-data boundaries hold. Evidence reviewed: (1) Implementation — all 7 required public exports exist (createDmsCoreCp225FailureBindingSliceDescriptor/CaseSet in service.js:4808/4841; validateDmsCoreCp225Coverage, validateDmsCoreCp225FailureBindingSliceDescriptor, createDmsCoreCp225HermesEvidencePacket/ClaudeReviewPacket/CloseoutHandoff in validators.js:6059-6204; re-exported via index.js). (2) Coverage/distribution — registry DMS_CORE_CP225_REQUIREMENTS and baseline included_units match the prompt deliverable_distribution exactly (failure_recovery:19, security_audit:4, implementation:6, hermes_evidence:4, fixture:2, test:4, claude_review:1 = 40) and micro_title split 20/20. (3) No-write/no-real-data — freezeCp225Result (service.js:4755) freezes 40+ boundary flags false; no-write attestation chain (registry.js:877) inherits silent_success_detected/leak_detected/promotes_claude_to_final_approval/claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; contract projection (dms-core-contract.json:44005) is descriptor-only with raw_payload_included=false and *_detail_included=false; command-evidence reports production_ready=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false. (4) Authority — descriptor authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false with human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; review-request is read_only with tools Read/Grep/Glob, model claude-opus-4-8, effort max, matching createDmsCoreCp225ClaudeReviewPacket. (5) Hermes — control-plane patterns used only for the H06 review/evidence packet and descriptor receipt shape (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. (6) Review hardening — readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON (exit 0, 1457-byte stdout); validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs asserts coverage validity, descriptor-only rows, deny-over-allow, excluded lock tokens, and authority boundaries; all 19 command-evidence commands exit 0 (full repo suite incl. npm test, npm run validate, git diff --check). (7) Changed-file scope correctly isolates the 8 active refs and preserves unrelated dirty/untracked files without inferring pack membership. production_ready=false is intentional for this descriptor-only stage pending human final approval; Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and is not treated as final approval authority. No P0-P3 findings; does not block pack or goal closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-225 dms core failure binding slice descriptor pack
